problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
